reference: I am twenty-one weeks pregnant with my second child. I have noticed that for the past week, I have been getting a lump on my inner lower breasts. I would rub them to break up the lumps, but they come back a couple of hours later. What is going on, and is there something I should do about it?
text: I am twenty-one weeks pregnant with my second child. I have noticed that for the past week, I have been having lumps in my lower breast. I would love them to break up the lumps, but they come back a couple of hours later. What is going on? Is there something I should do about it?
